name: Bombay Bistro

identity.notes: Official homepage, contact/location content, and linked ordering references agree on the Rockville restaurant; other Bombay Bistro domains/locations were excluded.

notes: Coordinator terminal catalog derived from validated Luna research and serialized APPLY output.
POC catalog and every frozen item were coordinator-reconciled.
All four official-matrix search classes completed; direct positives are retained and missing disclosure remains unavailable.
POC closeout uses a verified target-specific catalog transformation; shared-parser review is deferred.

sourceAttempts.location: Official homepage navigation, menu links, contact/location pages
